content_body: Daffodilly's, nestled in Copperhill, TN/McCaysville, GA, is a charming plant shop combined with The Folk Collaberative that offers a vibrant selection of plants and gardening essentials. Specializing in both indoor and outdoor plants, Daffodilly's provides an array of greenery, from lush houseplants and succulents to colorful flowers and shrubs. The shop also features a variety of gardening tools, pots, and workshops to help customers create their ideal garden space. With a passion for plants and a commitment to quality, the knowledgeable staff at Daffodilly's are always ready to offer expert advice and personalized service. Whether you're an experienced gardener or just starting out, Daffodilly's is the perfect destination for all your planting needs.
title: Daffodilly's Plant Co.
